content:
Advocates Playbook 017
How Senior Advocates Argue a Temporary Interim Injunction

The definitive courtroom guide on how senior advocates argue a temporary interim injunction in India under Order 39 Rule 1 & 2 CPC. Prima facie case, balance of convenience, irreparable injury, ex parte relief, landmark judgments & checklists

Read the complete article 👉🏻🔗
https://lnkd.in/d4hMpajk
comment: One practical nuance is that interim injunction strategy often turns on how convincingly urgency is demonstrated. A strong prima facie case alone may fail if delay appears self-created or damages can still be compensated.
